description: Condense the day into output, blockers, and next steps.
prompt: Review the last 24 hours of context and produce a daily summary with the most important work completed, open threads that still need attention, blockers that slowed me down, and the next concrete actions I should take tomorrow. Keep it crisp, factual, and organized by impact.

description: Surface unresolved blockers before they pile up.
prompt: Scan recent context for repeated failures, stalled tasks, waiting states, unresolved questions, or places where I kept circling without making progress. Group the blockers by theme, explain why they matter, and suggest the smallest next move that would unblock each one.

description: Catch context switching and fragmentation during the day.
prompt: Analyze the recent context for signs of focus drift: too many parallel threads, rapid context switching, abandoned tasks, or repeated revisiting of the same topic. Summarize where attention was fragmented and recommend how to simplify the next work block.

description: Summarize the week and identify leverage points.
prompt: Review the last 7 days of context and write a weekly review that highlights major wins, unfinished work that still carries momentum, recurring friction, and the most leveraged priorities for the coming week. Separate what was merely busy from what actually moved things forward.

description: Find conversations or people that need follow-up.
prompt: Look through recent context for people, conversations, or commitments that deserve a follow-up. List who or what needs attention, why it matters, what I might be forgetting, and draft a short suggested follow-up action for each one.
